texto: Because no one has more thirst for earth, for blood, and for ferocious sexuality than the creatures who inhabit cold mirrors
explicacao: Citação de Alejandra Pizarnik sobre temas ligados a desenvolvimento pessoal. “Because no one has more thirst for earth, for blood, and for ferocious sexuality than the creatur…” articula desenvolvimento-pessoal, blood, lust em registro de desenvolvimento pessoal, com relevância para contextos como lust e mirrors.

texto: An unchangeable colour rules over the melancholic: his dwelling is a space the colour of mourning. Nothing happens in it. No one intrudes. It is a bare stage where the inert I is assisted by the I suffering from that inertia. The latter wishes to free the former, but all efforts fail, as Theseus would have failed had he been not only himself but also the Minotaur; to kill him then, he would have had to kill himself
explicacao: Citação de Alejandra Pizarnik sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “An unchangeable colour rules over the melancholic: his dwelling is a space the colour of mourning…” articula autoestima, depression, melancholy em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e melancholy.

It is a bare stage where the inert I is assisted by the I suffering from that inertia. The latter wishes to free the former, but all efforts fail, as Theseus would have failed had he been not only himself but also the Minotaur; to kill him then, he would have had to kill himself

texto: But, who is Death? A figure that harrows and wastes wherever and however it pleases. This is also a possible description of the Countess Bathory. Never did anyone wish so hard not to grow old; I mean, to die. That is why, perhaps, she acted and played the role of Death. Because, how can Death possibly die?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Alejandra Pizarnik que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “But, who is Death? A figure that harrows and wastes wherever and however it pleases. This is also…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, death, figure, com foco em luto e reflexao.
